title: Custom Key past as hyperlink

posts.author: tcraig (Tayla Craig)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use the Task ID column religiously, and it would be fantastic if there was a 3rd option for “what to copy when. you click the cell”

I want to have the custom key that is hyper linked.

So when I paste, it shows as TDEV-033, but also a clickable link that takes me to the ticket.
